title: In Brasília-DF and São Paulo-SP, air traffic controllers detected several UFOs [1984]

text_preview:
NOV 1st, 1984. Time: 00:31. Duration: not determined. At 00:31 on November 1, 1984, the Brasília-DF Area Control Center [ACC-BS] activates the São Paulo-SP Approach Control [APP-SP] to find out if there were any aircraft flying, because they were “detecting a runway 5 NM southeast of São Paulo, at a speed of 13kt [24km/h], constantly varying from the bow”. At that time, APP-SP had not yet detected anything.

At 00:40, the ACC-BS was already detecting 2 “plots”: one to the southeast of Itanhaém-SP and the other to the vertical of São Paulo-SP. This time the APP-SP confirms the contacts. Meanwhi
summary: On Nov 1, 1984, Brasília and São Paulo air traffic control centers simultaneously detected multiple radar plots including up to 7 unidentified targets around São Paulo, with tower operators also making visual sightings.
